script:
set +e
echo '=== mskai-send-to.sh head ==='; head -25 /home/azureuser/mskai-send-to.sh 2>/dev/null
echo '=== aixa-send-to.sh head ==='; head -25 /home/azureuser/aixa-send-to.sh 2>/dev/null
echo '=== aixa-responder post_reply location ==='; grep -n 'def post_reply\|def _post_reply\|subprocess.run.*SENDER' /home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '=== END ==='
